[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110100 5
1 0101011100 5
2 1011111001 7
3 1111001111 8
4 0100001010 3
5 0010111111 7
6 1111111101 9
7 1111110011 8

01 10 1011000101 5
12 21 0110000101 4
23 32 0110100111 6
34 43 1010001011 5
45 54 1001010001 4
56 65 0010101110 5
67 76 1110100101 6
70 07 0100110110 5

02 20 1101000000 3
13 31 0000100010 2
24 42 1100101100 5
35 53 0011011010 5
46 64 1011111111 9
57 75 1100001011 5
60 06 1010010011 5
71 17 1111110011 8 match 7

03 30 1011100111 7
14 41 1010101001 5
25 52 0101111101 7
36 63 0001110100 4
47 74 0101011010 5
50 05 1000111101 6
61 16 0001010110 4
72 27 1001110110 6

15 51 0011111000 5
26 62 0111010011 6
37 73 1111010001 6
